translations.es: Estoy aprendiendo a tocar el piano ahora mismo.
translations.fr: J'apprends le piano en ce moment.
translations.it: Sto imparando a suonare il pianoforte adesso.
translations.ru: Я сейчас учусь играть на пианино.
translations.pt: Estou aprendendo a tocar piano agora.
translations.vi: Tôi đang học đàn piano bây giờ.
translations.ar: أنا أتعلّم العزف على البيانو الآن.
translations.uk: Я зараз вчуся грати на фортепіано.
translations.hi: मैं अभी पियानो सीख रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Uczę się teraz grać na pianinie.
translations.nb: Jeg lærer å spille piano nå.
translations.id: Saya sedang belajar bermain piano sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag håller på att lära mig spela piano just nu.
translations.ro: Învăț să cânt la pian chiar acum.
translations.cs: Právě se učím hrát na klavír.
translations.da: Jeg er i gang med at lære at spille klaver lige nu.
translations.ja: 今ピアノを習っています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular in nominative; serves as the subject of the clause.
Finite verb in present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate; transitive verb selecting 'Klavier' as its object.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb; indicates that the action is ongoing at the present time.
Common noun (neuter); functions as the direct object (accusative) of 'lerne'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder spielt heute Abend Klavier.

translations.de: Mein Bruder spielt heute Abend Klavier.
translations.en: My brother is playing piano this evening.
translations.es: Mi hermano toca el piano esta noche.
translations.fr: Mon frère joue du piano ce soir.
translations.it: Mio fratello suona il pianoforte stasera.
translations.ko: 제 형이 오늘 저녁에 피아노를 연주해요.
translations.ru: Мой брат сегодня вечером играет на пианино.
translations.pt: Meu irmão vai tocar piano hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi sẽ chơi đàn piano tối nay.
translations.ar: أخي سيعزف على البيانو هذا المساء.
translations.uk: Мій брат сьогодні ввечері грає на фортепіано.
translations.hi: मेरा भाई आज शाम पियानो बजा रहा है.
translations.pl: Mój brat gra dziś wieczorem na pianinie.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου παίζει πιάνο απόψε.
translations.nb: Broren min spiller piano i kveld.
translations.id: Kakak laki-laki saya akan bermain piano malam ini.
translations.ro: Fratele meu cântă la pian în seara asta.
translations.cs: Můj bratr dnes večer hraje na klavír.
translations.da: Min bror spiller klaver i aften.
translations.ja: 今夜、兄がピアノを弾きます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Bruder' (masculine singular nominative) to mark possession in the subject NP.
Common noun (masculine); head of the subject noun phrase; nominative case.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate; takes 'Klavier' as its direct object.
Temporal adverb modifying 'spielt'; specifies the time (the day) of the action.
Common noun used in the temporal expression 'heute Abend'; complements 'heute' to form an adverbial time phrase.
Common noun (neuter); direct object (accusative) of 'spielt'.

sentences.target: Bei Regen übe ich lieber Klavier.

translations.de: Bei Regen übe ich lieber Klavier.
translations.en: When it rains, I prefer to practice piano.
translations.es: Cuando llueve, prefiero practicar el piano.
translations.fr: Quand il pleut, je préfère m'exercer au piano.
translations.it: Quando piove, preferisco esercitarmi al pianoforte.
translations.ko: 비가 오면 피아노 연습하는 게 더 좋아요.
translations.zh-Hans: 下雨的时候，我更喜欢练钢琴。
translations.yue: 落雨嘅時候，我更鍾意練鋼琴。
translations.ru: В дождь я предпочитаю заниматься на пианино.
translations.he: כשיורד גשם, אני מעדיף להתאמן על הפסנתר.
translations.tr: Yağmur yağdığında piyano çalışmayı tercih ederim.
translations.vi: Khi trời mưa, tôi thích luyện đàn piano hơn.
translations.ar: عندما تمطر، أفضل أن أتدرّب على البيانو.
translations.nl: Als het regent, oefen ik lieber piano.
translations.uk: Коли йде дощ, я волію займатися на фортепіано.
translations.hi: बारिश में मैं पियानो का अभ्यास करना ज़्यादा पसंद करता हूँ.
translations.pl: Gdy pada deszcz, wolę ćwiczyć na pianinie.
translations.el: Όταν βρέχει, προτιμώ να εξασκούμαι στο πιάνο.
translations.nb: Når det regner, øver jeg heller på piano.
translations.id: Saat hujan, saya lebih suka berlatih piano.
translations.sv: När det regnar föredrar jag att öva på piano.
translations.ro: Când plouă, prefer să exersez la pian.
translations.cs: Když prší, raději cvičím na klavír.
translations.da: Når det regner, vil jeg hellere øve klaver.
translations.ja: 雨の日はピアノの練習をするほうが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative; introduces a fronted prepositional phrase expressing condition/time.
Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'bei' in dative; forms a weather/condition PP.
Finite verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; main predicate of the clause.
Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the clause.
Comparative adverb (from 'gern'); modifies 'übe' and expresses preference.
Common noun (neuter); direct object (accusative) of 'übe'.

sentences.target: Im Wohnzimmer steht ein altes Klavier.

translations.de: Im Wohnzimmer steht ein altes Klavier.
translations.en: There’s an old piano in the living room.
translations.es: En la sala hay un piano antiguo.
translations.fr: Il y a un vieux piano dans le salon.
translations.it: In salotto c'è un vecchio pianoforte.
translations.pt: Na sala de estar há um piano antigo.
translations.vi: Trong phòng khách có một cây đàn piano cũ.
translations.ar: في غرفة الجلوس يوجد بيانو قديم.
translations.nl: In de woonkamer staat een oude piano.
translations.hu: A nappaliban áll egy régi zongora.
translations.hi: लिविंग रूम में एक पुराना पियानो है.
translations.el: Στο σαλόνι υπάρχει ένα παλιό πιάνο.
translations.nb: I stua står det et gammelt piano.
translations.id: Di ruang tamu ada sebuah piano tua.
translations.sv: I vardagsrummet står ett gammalt piano.
translations.ro: În living se află un pian vechi.
translations.cs: V obývacím pokoji stojí staré piano.
translations.da: I stuen står der et gammelt klaver.
translations.ja: リビングに古いピアノがあります。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition introducing a dative prepositional phrase that sets the location.
Common compound noun (neuter); object of the preposition ('im'); dative case indicating location.
Finite verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate expressing the location/existence of the subject.
Indefinite article; determiner of 'Klavier'; nominative singular neuter.
Attributive adjective; inflected (mixed declension) agreeing with 'Klavier' (nominative singular neuter); modifies the noun.
Common noun (neuter); head of the subject noun phrase; nominative; the entity that is located in the living room.
